elements.original_description: A human brain with a confused expression, floating in the center of a pure white background. The brain is colored in shades of pink and gray, with cartoonish eyes and a furrowed brow.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a human brain with a confused expression, floating in the center of a pure white background. The brain is colored in shades of pink and gray, with cartoonish eyes and a furrowed brow. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients. Dark, moody lighting to represent 'The problem'.

elements.original_description: A human brain with a magnifying glass hovering over it, examining a thought bubble containing a question mark. The brain is colored in shades of pink and gray, floating in the center of a pure white background.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a human brain with a magnifying glass hovering over it, examining a thought bubble containing a question mark. The brain is colored in shades of pink and gray, floating in the center of a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients.
